page_title: About Us | Parents' Place of Maryland
evidence_snippet: Parents’ Place supports families of children with disabilities and special health care needs. Serving as Maryland’s Parent Training and Information Center and Family-to-Family Health Information Center, Parents’ Place supports thousands of Maryland families each year.
review_notes: The homepage preserved special-education information-center language, but the About page preserves the explicit Parent Training and Information Center designation needed for PTI verification.
